description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story apartment building with a flat, gray roof and a brick facade. The exterior features regularly spaced, vertically aligned windows with decorative awnings above each, and the lower portion of the building is clad in a darker, stone-like material. The main entrance is accessed by a central staircase leading up from the street, flanked by metal railings, and there is a secondary side entrance with its own set of stairs. The windows are symmetrically arranged, giving the building a balanced and orderly appearance. The structure is robust and utilitarian, typical of early 20th-century urban residential architecture. The overall color palette consists of warm brown bricks, dark window frames, and a muted gray roof.
description: A three-story brick apartment building with a flat gray roof, symmetrical windows, and a central staircase leading to the main entrance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick facade, rows of windows, and a side staircase with metal railings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central staircase, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible side staircase and consistent window pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back facade with evenly spaced windows and no visible entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a symmetrical, grid-like pattern with even vertical and horizontal spacing across all visible facades.
